bonuses.leadin: This architect was influenced by Palladio when he designed the Banqueting House, Whitehall in a classical style. For 10 points each:
parts: James I got this man to paint the ceiling of the Banqueting House by promising to knight him. After he got knighted and finished the ceiling, he infuriated James by going home again.
Anne of Denmark, the wife of James I, commissioned Inigo Jones to design this building in Greenwich. He put in a beautiful tulip staircase.
